option.value:
package com.ramzi.personalexpensemanagment.ui.navigation
sealed class Screen(val route: String) { object Home : Screen("home") object AddExpense : Screen("add_expense") object ExpenseList : Screen("expense_list") object Stats : Screen("stats") }
